hero.title: Practice thinking clearly. Speak with structure.
hero.subtitle: Noetic helps learners build argumentation, reflection, and communication skills through guided debate training that feels calm, rigorous, and approachable.
hero.panelTopicBody: Start with prompts designed to surface judgment, tradeoffs, and the shape of your reasoning.
hero.panelPracticeBody: Respond in rounds, test counterarguments, and refine how you explain what you actually mean.
hero.panelReflection: Feedback that helps you think better, not just talk faster.

intro.label: What Noetic is
intro.title: A calmer way to train reasoning, communication, and intellectual confidence.
intro.paragraphOne: Noetic is a debate practice platform for learners who want to think more clearly, organize ideas more effectively, and express themselves with confidence.
intro.paragraphTwo: Instead of making debate feel performative or intimidating, Noetic turns it into a guided reflective practice. Users explore arguments, test responses, and improve how they reason through ideas over time.

reasoning.title: Encourages clear reasoning
reasoning.body: Each session focuses on structure, tradeoffs, and the quality of an argument rather than volume or theatrics.

approachable.title: Makes practice approachable
approachable.body: The tone is thoughtful and supportive, so learners can improve without the pressure of a performative debate room.

growth.title: Supports communication growth
growth.body: Noetic helps learners articulate positions, respond under pressure, and reflect on where their thinking needs refinement.

audience.title: Useful across contexts
audience.body: Designed for students, educators, and ambitious learners who want stronger communication and sharper judgment.

students.label: Built with learner-first practice in mind, from first-time debaters to academically ambitious speakers.

sessions.label: Every flow is designed around clear prompts, response loops, and feedback that gives shape to improvement.

design.label: The product is meant to feel calm and credible, not noisy, gamified, or theatrically competitive.

how.label: How it works
how.title: A deliberate three-step practice loop.
how.intro: Noetic keeps the experience simple: pick a prompt, work through your response, and receive feedback you can act on.

one.title: Choose a topic
one.body: Start from a debate prompt or discussion question that matches your level, subject area, or learning goal.

two.title: Practice your response
two.body: Clarify your position, organize supporting reasons, and test how well your thinking holds under challenge.

three.title: Receive structured feedback
three.body: Review targeted guidance on reasoning, clarity, and communication so each round leads to noticeable improvement.

associations.label: Background and associations
associations.body: Designed by a team shaped by work across education, communication, and learner-facing products.

appPreview.title: App Demo Video
appPreview.description: Watch a screen recording of the Noetic app in action.

footer.tagline: Debate practice for thoughtful learners who want sharper reasoning and clearer communication.
